function.message: I reviewed the next inbox item but cannot safely complete it as written. The request asks to compare two projects and delete whichever started first, but one reference ('attic rainwater rig') does not resolve to a canonical project in 40_projects, and 'workflow product' is not uniquely identified. I left the inbox item in place and made no mutations.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied process-next-inbox-item workflow, project lane canonical rule (README in 40_projects), and deletion-and-wiping rule requiring uniquely supported delete target; when not uniquely supported, stop and ask for clarification without mutating.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical project lookup did not uniquely identify both targets: 40_projects searches for 'attic rainwater rig' (and keywords attic/rainwater/rig) returned no project matches, while 'workflow product' search was non-unique. Under deletion workflow, deletion cannot proceed without uniquely supported target.
